name: riannah's garden
summary: V1 is live on Cloudflare with closed-beta auth/RBAC, admin user provisioning, plant CRUD, watering+repot schedules/events, and post-v1 hardening now in main (auth validation, persistent login bootstrap, API security + HSTS + cross-domain + DNS-prefetch-control + tightened Permissions-Policy incl. browsing-topics disablement + COOP + COEP + CORP + Origin-Agent-Cluster + X-Download-Options + X-Robots-Tag + X-XSS-Protection + legacy X-Content-Security-Policy + Content-Language headers, CORS cache-key hardening via expanded Vary controls, __Host-rp_session cookie hardening with Priority=High, no-store cache-control + Surrogate-Control: no-store, and logout Clear-Site-Data response hardening promoted via verified develop deploy + release flow).
